title: Rift
description: a Minecraft client that improves FPS and improves PVP
body:
# About the mod pack
![the Modpack Rift's Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e14b22f16d0bc0b5eb0d3b0bd083b53fc47db6.png)

This is a modpack that is a **minecraft client for minecraft PvP and playing with friends made for modrith**. This modpack adds many mods to enhance your PvP experience **while not breaking any hypixel rules**. this modpack aslo optimizes te game to its core and contains 19 mods as of 2025 August 4th

## and if you are interested on what mods are in this modpack here they are in Alphabetical Order
- Continuity
- Dark Loading Screen
- Dynamic FPS
- ETF Entity Texture Features
- Entity Culling
- Euphoria Patches
- Fabric API
- FerriteCore
- GLSL Paroranma Shaders
- Hydrogen
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Lamb Dynamic Lights
- Lithium
- Nuit (formally Skyboxes)
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight

# Where to Donate
